REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (539 20th Ave., San Francisco, Ca 94121)
Off Calendar Nov-28-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Irene Barese (Counsel for Katherine White and Elena Perekrestov, Co-Personal Representatives).

After announcing the sale of the property and receiving no overbids, the Court confirmed the sale at $925,000.00, signing the Order for same in open court.

Judicial Officer: John Dearman, Judge; Court Reporter: Mary Ellen Scherer CSR# 5802; Bailiff: Deputies Cruz and Mizota; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Court Examiner: Christine Nahnsen.
